scenes.dialogue: El sesenta y tres por ciento de los profesionales de marketing en España ya usa inteligencia artificial.
scenes.motion_prompt: Confident frontal stance, eyes locked on camera throughout, subtle authoritative micro-nod at the end of the sentence, calm closed-mouth professional smile maintained, minimal head movement, no hand gestures.

scenes.dialogue: Y la cifra crece cada mes.
scenes.motion_prompt: Same frontal stance, subtle emphatic nod on the final phrase, neutral brows, eyes steady on camera, closed-mouth confident expression.

scenes.dialogue: Si tú aún no la dominas, el riesgo no es perder oportunidades.
scenes.motion_prompt: Slight forward lean of the torso, subtly furrowed brow with warm grave expression, no smile, eyes steady on camera with intent gaze, no hand gestures.
Tight reframe, head slightly tilted forward by 3 degrees, eyes locked directly into camera lens with fixed intent gaze, brows lifted slightly on delivery, jaw firm, closed-mouth, no smile.

scenes.dialogue: En Ciberaula aprenderás a automatizar campañas
scenes.motion_prompt: Right hand with index finger extended rises subtly to chest height as she emphasizes the count, single brief affirmative head nod mid-sentence, confident closed-mouth smile, eyes steady on camera throughout, keep the one-finger gesture stable and clean.

Right hand with index and middle fingers extended together stays steady at chest height, very subtle head tilt of two degrees, calm confident expression, micro head nod on the keyword, eyes locked on camera, keep the two-finger gesture stable and clean.

Subtle upward lift of the right hand showing three extended fingers as she emphasizes the count, single brief affirmative head nod mid-sentence, soft confident closed-mouth smile, eyes steady on camera throughout, keep the three-finger gesture stable and clean.

scenes.dialogue: y crear vídeos profesionales en minutos.
scenes.motion_prompt: Both hands remain relaxed at her sides out of frame, slightly warmer and more pronounced closed-mouth smile closing the list with satisfaction, subtle confident head nod on the final words, calm steady eyes on camera, no hand gestures.

scenes.dialogue: Justo lo que tu competencia ya está aprendiendo.
scenes.motion_prompt: Tight close-up energy, subtle raised right eyebrow on the words tu competencia, micro head tilt of two degrees to the left, slight knowing closed-mouth smile, intense steady eye contact with camera, no hand gestures.

scenes.dialogue: Y lo mejor: es cien por cien bonificable por Fundáe.
scenes.motion_prompt: Subtle complicit warm smile starts on the opening words, slight head tilt of two to three degrees toward camera on Fundae, warm trustworthy expression conveying good news between colleagues, eyes steady on camera, no hand gestures.

scenes.dialogue: Sin coste para ti como trabajador.
scenes.motion_prompt: Left hand enters frame from below with open palm facing up in a transparent inclusive gesture as he says sin coste para ti, slow affirmative nod mid-phrase, warm relaxed smile, eyes steady on camera.

scenes.dialogue: Nosotros gestionamos todo el papeleo con tu empresa.
scenes.motion_prompt: Left hand still subtly visible in lower frame palm-up, steady eyes, definitive firm nod on the closing words, closed-mouth confident smile, calm warm expression.

scenes.dialogue: Ciberaula. Formando profesionales desde mil novecientos noventa y seis.
scenes.motion_prompt: Serene composed institutional smile, calm authoritative expression, very slight emphasis nod on the year reference, no hand gestures, posture upright and confident.

scenes.dialogue: Solicita tu plaza en ciberaula punto com antes de que cierre la convocatoria.
emphasis_words: antes de que cierre la convocatoria
scenes.motion_prompt: Calm authoritative inviting expression, subtle closed-mouth professional smile maintained throughout, single very subtle affirmative closing nod on the final word, eyes steady on camera lens for the entire duration, no hand gestures, posture upright.
